name: Acrylic - New Tab
description: Crystal-clear productivity. The most beautiful glassmorphism dashboard for Chrome.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; img-src 'self' http: https: data: blob:; frame-src https://www.youtube.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com
content_security_policy.sandbox: sandbox allow-scripts; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://www.youtube.com https://s.ytimg.com; child-src https://www.youtube.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com; frame-src https://www.youtube.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com
